20-21. SIGNS OF PREDOMINANT PHLEGMATIC TEMPERAMENT. One with predominant
phlegmatic temperament will be wealthy, will have clung joints, be courageous and strong,
will have a bright and charming physique, be a recipient (of gifts, benefits etc.), be Sattvik, will
have voice akin to the sound of a drum and roaring clouds, be enduring, fair in complexion,
will have reddish eyes, will enjoy sweet drinks, (sometimes) will be highly inimical, be
grateful, be friendly to all and will honour elders. His dreams will be seas, rivers, coral stones,
lakes, swan, conch, stars, lily, snowfall etc. These effects are attributed by the sages.
22. LUMINARIES IN MAHAPURUSHA YOGAS.
Though Mars etc. may be strong in the respective cases of Pancha Mahapurusha Yogas (vide
